name: Pickup Selection Still Shows Shipping Fee
description: Select in-store pickup but the order total still includes a shipping fee because the fee removal only triggers on 'free_shipping' flag, not 'pickup'.

steps.name: Proceed to checkout
steps.nova_act_prompt: Open cart and click 'Proceed to Checkout'

steps.name: Fill shipping address
steps.nova_act_prompt: Fill: Bob Wilson, 321 Pine St, Seattle, WA 98101

steps.name: Verify no shipping fee
steps.nova_act_prompt: Check that the order summary does NOT include a shipping fee
steps.expected: No shipping fee line, or $0.00 shipping

steps.name: Place order
steps.expected: Order placed with no shipping fee

seeded_bugs.name: Pickup still charges shipping
seeded_bugs.description: Shipping fee removal checks for deliveryMethod === 'free_shipping' but pickup sets it to 'pickup', so the $5.99 fee persists
